name: Hopeless Masochists || Himeko Nukumi and Kouki Tsuzurahara
description:
"Oh, and before I die, mind if you can do me one last request? Well, believe it or not, I'm still a virgin and I don't really wanna die as one. Think you can help me with that?"

Description: Himeko Nukumi and Kouki Tsuzurahara are two depressed girls who are looking to die. Himeko was once known as the "Goon Princess", a popular anonymous persona that ranked first in GoonTube in masturbation videos before getting exposed by her classmates and subsequently kicked out by her parents. Kouki was bullied by her peers and teachers at her school due to her obscene and overly busty body, causing the girl to become a shut-in.

Together, both girls are hopelessly addicted to masturbation and recognize that they have no reason to go on. Either way, their lives are in your hands based on your next actions, literally...

Series: Jinsei Recycle - RECYCLE of the LIFE

Artist: Asanagi | Fatalpulse | Victim Girls
creator: Chunter
